source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, in $\triangle ABC$, points $D$ and $E$ are on sides $AB$ and $AC$, respectively, with $DE \parallel BC$ and $BC = 6$. Given that the area of quadrilateral $BCED$ is $8$ times the area of $\triangle ADE$, what is the length of $DE$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Since ${S}_{\text{quadrilateral} BCED}=8{S}_{\triangle ADE}$,
it follows that ${S}_{\triangle ABC}={S}_{\triangle ADE}+{S}_{\text{quadrilateral} BCED}={S}_{\triangle ADE}+8{S}_{\triangle ADE}=9{S}_{\triangle ADE}$,
thus $\frac{{S}_{\triangle ADE}}{{S}_{\triangle ABC}}=\frac{1}{9}$,
Since DE$\parallel$BC, it follows that $\angle$ADE=$\angle$B, $\angle$AED=$\angle$C,
which implies $\triangle ADE\sim \triangle ABC$,
therefore $\frac{{S}_{\triangle ADE}}{{S}_{\triangle ABC}}=\left(\frac{DE}{BC}\right)^{2}=\frac{1}{9}$,
hence $\frac{DE}{BC}=\frac{1}{3}$,
Since BC＝6, it follows that $DE=\frac{1}{3}BC=\frac{1}{3}\times 6=\boxed{2}$.

image_dependency: 题干含有“As shown in the figure”且 `requires_image=true`，说明图像被显式引用。
但题干文字已给出关键几何关系：D、E 分别在 AB、AC 上，且 `DE \parallel BC`、`BC=6`，求解所需条件基本完整。
`text_dominant=false` 与存在 1 张已登记图片表明样本按多模态收录，但从文字看图像并非唯一信息来源。
multi_step: 需要先由“四边形 BCED 面积是三角形 ADE 的 8 倍”推出 `S_ABC = 9 S_ADE`，得到面积比 `1/9`。
再利用 `DE \parallel BC` 推出 `\triangle ADE \sim \triangle ABC`，把面积比转为边长比平方。
最后由 `DE/BC=1/3` 且 `BC=6` 计算出 `DE=2`，属于明确的多步几何推理。
verifiability: 目标答案是单一数值长度 `DE`，标准解给出明确结果 `2`，终值易核验。
解题链条包含可检查的中间量：面积比 `1/9`、相似关系、边长比 `1/3`，适合规则化核验。
`registry_passed=true`，题干、答案和图片资产均已登记存在，降低样本缺失导致的核验不确定性。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案与图片资产均已登记存在，`registry_passed=true`，核心语义支撑完整。
综合信号较强：多步推理分和可核验分较高，且目标答案为明确数值结果，适合进入候选池。
虽然存在 `answer_type_inconsistency_top_level_vs_manifest` 与 `image_need_may_be_overstated_by_metadata` 风险标记，但它们更像元数据一致性或依赖程度判断问题，不构成核心资产缺失。

field_audit_records.after_value:
\textbf{Solution:} Since ${S}_{\text{quadrilateral} BCED}=8{S}_{\triangle ADE}$,
it follows that ${S}_{\triangle ABC}={S}_{\triangle ADE}+{S}_{\text{quadrilateral} BCED}={S}_{\triangle ADE}+8{S}_{\triangle ADE}=9{S}_{\triangle ADE}$,
thus $\frac{{S}_{\triangle ADE}}{{S}_{\triangle ABC}}=\frac{1}{9}$,
Since DE$\parallel$BC, it follows that $\angle$ADE=$\angle$B, $\angle$AED=$\angle$C,
which implies $\triangle ADE\sim \triangle ABC$,
therefore $\frac{{S}_{\triangle ADE}}{{S}_{\triangle ABC}}=\left(\frac{DE}{BC}\right)^{2}=\frac{1}{9}$,
hence $\frac{DE}{BC}=\frac{1}{3}$,
Since BC=6, it follows that $DE=\frac{1}{3}BC=\frac{1}{3}\times 6=\boxed{2}$

variants.title: MM-Math 开放题
variants.rewritten_question_text: As shown in the figure, in $\triangle ABC$, points $D$ and $E$ are on sides $AB$ and $AC$, respectively, with $DE \parallel BC$ and $BC = 6$. Given that the area of quadrilateral $BCED$ is $8$ times the area of $\triangle ADE$, what is the length of $DE$?
variants.expected_answer:
\textbf{Solution:} Since ${S}_{\text{quadrilateral} BCED}=8{S}_{\triangle ADE}$,
it follows that ${S}_{\triangle ABC}={S}_{\triangle ADE}+{S}_{\text{quadrilateral} BCED}={S}_{\triangle ADE}+8{S}_{\triangle ADE}=9{S}_{\triangle ADE}$,
thus $\frac{{S}_{\triangle ADE}}{{S}_{\triangle ABC}}=\frac{1}{9}$,
Since DE$\parallel$BC, it follows that $\angle$ADE=$\angle$B, $\angle$AED=$\angle$C,
which implies $\triangle ADE\sim \triangle ABC$,
therefore $\frac{{S}_{\triangle ADE}}{{S}_{\triangle ABC}}=\left(\frac{DE}{BC}\right)^{2}=\frac{1}{9}$,
hence $\frac{DE}{BC}=\frac{1}{3}$,
Since BC=6, it follows that $DE=\frac{1}{3}BC=\frac{1}{3}\times 6=\boxed{2}$

Given that the area of quadrilateral $BCED$ is $8$ times the area of $\triangle ADE$, what is the length of $DE$?

thus $\frac{{S}_{\triangle ADE}}{{S}_{\triangle ABC}}=\frac{1}{9}$,
Since DE$\parallel$BC, it follows that $\angle$ADE=$\angle$B, $\angle$AED=$\angle$C,
which implies $\triangle ADE\sim \triangle ABC$,
